comment: At first it was good. Last year they resodded the yard, planted some flowers and we hired them to mow and maintain. Then the trouble started. All 12 of the gardenias that Wade insisted we plant died. All of them! Everytime we called it was something we were doing wrong. But ALL of them. Then the grass issues began. Again, all our fault. We were doing something wrong. But we weren't. We did everything they told us to do. We spent a lot of money with this company. And honestly this is what we got.
draft_response: We are sorry about your experience, tammy. This does not reflect the standard we hold at Black Hill Landscaping. We would welcome the chance to speak with you directly and address your concerns. Please reach out at (817) 995-0324.
